changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('jhi_user') AND name = 'perfil_id' ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE jhi_user ADD perfil_id INT NULL; END

changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE name = 'fk_user_perfil' AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('jhi_user') ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE jhi_user ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user_perfil FOREIGN KEY (perfil_id) REFERENCES perfil(id); END

changeSet.author: custom
